message:
fix(fr-command): CLIENT PAUSE/UNBLOCK error parity with upstream

- CLIENT PAUSE arity now emits the subcommand-specific error
  'unknown subcommand or wrong number of arguments for PAUSE.
  Try CLIENT HELP.' instead of the generic wrong-arity reply.
  (br-frankenredis-clipausearity)

- CLIENT UNBLOCK 0 and negative IDs now return Integer(0) (no
  client matched), matching upstream networking.c::clientCommand.
  Only non-numeric IDs surface 'value is not an integer or out
  of range'. (br-frankenredis-cliunblockid)

Updates the affected fr-command tests for the new wording and
behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
